Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanConfigContext.Builder

Packages that use BeanConfigContext.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.

  • Uses of BeanConfigContext.Builder in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return BeanConfigContext.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.annotationProvider(AnnotationProvider value)
    Sets the active AnnotationProvider.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanClassVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean class visibility.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanConstructorVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean constructor visibility.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanFieldVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean field visibility.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanMapPutReturnsOldValue(boolean value)
    Toggles whether BeanMap.put(String,Object) returns the previous value rather than null.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanMetaInitializer(BeanMetaInitializer value)
    Sets the BeanMetaInitializer SPI hook for marshalling-side BeanMeta construction.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanMethodVisibility(Visibility value)
    Sets the minimum bean method visibility.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanPropertyPostProcessor(BeanPropertyPostProcessor value)
    Sets the BeanPropertyPostProcessor SPI hook for marshalling-side bean-property post-processing.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beansRequireDefaultConstructor(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans have a no-arg default constructor.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beansRequireSerializable(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans implement Serializable.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beansRequireSettersForGetters(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that bean getters have matching setters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beansRequireSomeProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles the requirement that beans expose at least one property.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanStore(BeanStore value)
    Sets the active BeanStore used for factory-based bean instantiation.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanTypePropertyName(String value)
    Sets the property name used to embed the bean dictionary type (default: "_type").
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.copy()
    Returns a builder pre-populated with the values from this context.
    static BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.create()
    Creates a new builder for BeanConfigContext.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.findFluentSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles fluent-setter detection (setters that return this).
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property getters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent suppression of exceptions thrown by bean property setters.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreMissingSetters(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of properties without setters during deserialization.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreTransientFields(boolean value)
    Toggles exclusion of transient fields from bean property detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreUnknownBeanProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of unknown properties on incoming bean payloads.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles silent ignoring of attempts to set unknown bean properties to null.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notABeanPredicate(Predicate<ClassInfo> value)
    Installs a custom predicate that fully overrides BeanConfigContext.isNotABean(ClassInfo).
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanClasses(Class<?>... values)
    Adds classes (and supertypes) that should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanClasses(Collection<? extends Class<?>> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean class set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanPackageNames(String... values)
    Adds package names whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanPackageNames(Collection<String> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean package name set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanPackagePrefixes(String... values)
    Adds package prefixes whose classes should be excluded from bean detection.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.notBeanPackagePrefixes(Collection<String> values)
    Replaces the not-a-bean package prefix set.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.propertyNamer(PropertyNamer value)
    Sets the PropertyNamer used to derive property names.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.unsortedProperties(boolean value)
    Toggles whether properties remain in JVM-discovered (non-alphabetical) order.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.useInterfaceProxies(boolean value)
    Toggles automatic creation of interface proxies for bean interfaces.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.useJavaBeanIntrospector(boolean value)
    Toggles use of Introspector for property discovery.
